/usr/bin/ar qc librace_dsp.a CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/Oscillator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/Waveform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/SimdOscillator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/Envelope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/Voice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/Biquad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/StateVariableFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/DelayLine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/race_dsp.dir/src/DSP_utilities/SoftClip.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librace_dsp.a
